review_criteria: Verify the amendment explicitly records the executed facts for V0.6-M1 (Repository Hygiene), V0.6-M2 (Historical Archive Consolidation), and V0.6-M3 (Documentation Center Unification).
Verify the revised canonical milestone map maps the remaining required V0.6 objectives to M4 through M6.

Verify the kickoff's original commitments (Path/Runtime Hardening, Integration Smoke/Workflow Consistency) are explicitly stated as NOT deleted, but incorporated into the M4-M6 mandatory workstreams and exit criteria.
Verify all previously approved V0.5 carry-overs (Path Resolution Fragility, Reviewer Output Delivery, Approval Gating Automation) are explicitly preserved in the revised milestone map.
Verify that NO implementation files or directories are modified by this amendment document.
